cases.title: Every documented paginated list endpoint returns total in response envelope
preconditions: Seeded data covering all eight paginated endpoints: GET /events, GET /events/{eventId}/registrations, waitlist, attendance, eligibility, audit-logs, status-history, and GET /me/registrations
Valid JWT tokens for participant and organizer actors with required scopes
steps: Issue paginated GET requests to each endpoint with page=1 and endpoint default pageSize
Assert each response body includes items (array), page, pageSize, total (integer), and totalPages
cases.expected: All eight paginated endpoints return HTTP 200 with the envelope shape from API design section 3 including a present total field; no bare array responses; satisfies FR-31 total count metadata on every paginated list response

cases.title: total reflects full matching row count before paging not current page length
preconditions: Event with exactly 25 registrations persisted in Postgres
Real database test harness with transaction rollback per test
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=2&pageSize=20
Compare total to items.length on each page and to direct COUNT in persistence layer
cases.expected: Page 1 has items.length=20 and total=25; page 2 has items.length=5 and total=25; total equals full matching row count per API design total definition and testing plan paginated list queries integration target

cases.title: Events list page 2 returns unchanged total metadata per testing-plan §3
preconditions: At least 13 published events visible to the requesting actor (more than default pageSize of 12)
Authenticated participant or public access per GET /events visibility rules
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12&sort=startAt:asc and record total and totalPages
GET /api/v1/events?page=2&pageSize=12&sort=startAt:asc
Compare page-2 total to page-1 total
cases.expected: Page-2 response has total matching page-1 total, totalPages=ceil(total/12), and items are the correct second slice per testing-plan §3 row: Events list page 2 → correct slice + total (AC-13, FR-31)

cases.title: Events list total reflects search and state filter scope before paging
preconditions: Mixed event catalog with searchable names and varied states
At least 13 RegistrationOpen events matching q=workshop plus additional non-matching events
Authenticated participant or actor with list visibility
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 and record unfiltered total
GET /api/v1/events?q=workshop&state=RegistrationOpen&page=1&pageSize=12
Compare filtered total to unfiltered total and to manually counted matching rows
cases.expected: Filtered response total equals count of events matching both q and state filters only; total is less than or equal to unfiltered total; totalPages=ceil(filtered total/pageSize); FR-31 total metadata scoped to applied filters

cases.title: Registrations list total reflects optional state filter
preconditions: Event with registrations in Registered, Waitlisted, and Cancelled states
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 and record unfiltered total
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?state=Registered&page=1&pageSize=20
Count Registered rows in database for the event
cases.expected: State-filtered total equals count of registrations with state=Registered only; unfiltered total equals all registration rows for the event; satisfies FR-31 total on organizer operational registrations list per API design optional state filter

cases.title: My registrations total scoped to current actor only
preconditions: Participant A with 3 registrations across events
Participant B with 5 registrations across events
Authenticated JWT for Participant A
Real Postgres test database
steps: GET /api/v1/me/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 as Participant A
Independently count Participant A registration rows in persistence layer
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with total=3 matching Participant A rows only; total does not include Participant B registrations; FR-31 total on participant own registrations list per GET /me/registrations contract

cases.title: Status history list total reflects all transitions for event scope
preconditions: Event with multiple registration status change records
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/status-history?page=1&pageSize=20
Count status history rows for the event in persistence layer
cases.expected: Response total equals full status history row count for the event before paging; supports FR-23 traceability and FR-31 total on operational status history list per testing plan status history retrieval scenario

cases.title: Audit logs list total equals full matching row count per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event with multiple audit log entries from critical config changes
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/audit-logs?page=1&pageSize=20
Verify total against persistence row count
cases.expected: HTTP 200; total equals full matching audit row count before paging; totalPages computed correctly per testing-plan §3 row: Audit logs paginated → ordered + total count (AC-13, FR-31)

cases.title: Eligibility list total reflects optional eligibility filter
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated Eligible and NotEligible participants
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?page=1&pageSize=20 and record unfiltered total
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?eligibility=Eligible&page=1&pageSize=20
cases.expected: Unfiltered total equals all evaluated eligibility rows; Eligible filter total equals Eligible row count only; FR-31 total metadata respects eligibility filter on organizer eligibility operational list

cases.title: total remains identical across sequential page requests for same query
preconditions: Paginated list endpoint with at least three pages of data at pageSize=10
Authenticated actor with list access
steps: GET page=1, page=2, and page=3 with pageSize=10 on the same endpoint and filters
Compare total on each response
cases.expected: total is identical on every page response; only items array differs between pages; enables reliable client pagination controls per FR-31 and AC-13

cases.title: Beyond-last-page request returns unchanged total with empty items
preconditions: Paginated list endpoint with known total row count (e.g. GET /events with total <= 12)
Valid authentication where required
steps: GET list endpoint with page=1 and pageSize=20; record total and totalPages
GET same endpoint with page=totalPages+1 and same pageSize
cases.expected: Beyond-last-page response has items: [], page equals requested page, total and totalPages match page-1 metadata; FR-31 total still returned on empty page per API design section 3

cases.title: Empty matching result set returns total zero with valid envelope
preconditions: Event with no registrations
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items: [], total=0, totalPages=1 (or consistent zero-total convention), page=1, pageSize=20; FR-31 total count present even when no rows match

cases.title: total unchanged when pageSize varies for same filter query
preconditions: Event with 30 registrations
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=10 and record total
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 with same filters
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=100 with same filters
cases.expected: total=30 on all three responses; only totalPages and items.length differ; total is independent of pageSize per FR-31 matching-rows-before-paging semantics

cases.title: total increases after new registration added between list requests
preconditions: Event with 10 existing registrations and available capacity
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin for list queries
Separate participant available to register
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 and record total
Participant registers for the event successfully
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 again
cases.expected: Second response total equals first total plus one; total reflects current matching row count after data mutation; FR-31 total is authoritative for organizer operational list freshness

cases.title: Registrations list total accurate when total exceeds pageSize per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event with 25 registrations (exceeds default pageSize of 20)
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=2&pageSize=20
cases.expected: Page 1 items.length=20 with total=25; page 2 items.length=5 with total=25; totalPages=2 per testing-plan §3 row: Registrations list beyond capacity → never returns more than pageSize items (AC-13, NFR-16, FR-31)

cases.title: Large result set returns accurate total without loading all rows into response body
preconditions: Database seeded with more than 500 rows for a paginated endpoint (e.g. audit-logs or registrations)
OrganizerAdmin actor with event scope
Test environment uses deterministic fixtures per testing plan section 7
steps: Record start time
GET paginated list with page=1 and pageSize=20
Verify response body size and total field against known seeded row count
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items.length <= pageSize; total equals full seeded matching row count (>500); response completes within acceptable latency per NFR-16; FR-31 total metadata returned via efficient count query not full row materialization

cases.title: Event overview registration count aligns with registrations list total metadata
preconditions: Event with known registration count across states
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/overview or dashboard aggregate endpoint
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20
Compare overview registration count to list total
cases.expected: Dashboard or overview registration count equals registrations list total metadata; operational summary and paginated list share authoritative count per FR-22 and FR-31 consistency

cases.title: Participant event browse page displays server-driven total in pagination range label
preconditions: At least 13 discoverable events seeded (exceeds default pageSize of 12)
Authenticated participant logged in
Participant event discovery browse page reachable
steps: Navigate to participant event browse list page
Observe pagination range label or equivalent summary text (e.g. 1–12 of N)
Navigate to page 2 using pagination controls
Observe updated range label reflecting second page slice and same total N
cases.expected: Page 1 displays range label such as 1–12 of N where N matches API total metadata; page 2 displays 13–N of N; UI derives display from server total not client-side full-dataset length per page list participant event discovery and FR-31

cases.title: Organizer registrations table footer shows total count in range label across pages
preconditions: Event with more than 20 registrations
OrganizerAdmin logged in with access to event registrations page at /organizer/events/{eventId}/registrations
steps: Navigate to organizer event registrations page
Observe pagination range label in table footer or toolbar (e.g. 1–20 of N)
Navigate to page 2
Verify range label updates to 21–N of N with same total N
cases.expected: Page 1 shows range label such as 1–20 of N; page 2 shows 21–N of N where N matches GET /events/{eventId}/registrations total; table renders only current page rows per page list organizer registration management and FR-31

cases.title: Participant denied organizer paginated list before total envelope is returned
preconditions: Event with registrations and audit log entries
Authenticated Participant JWT without organizer operational list permissions per 01-roles-permissions.md
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/audit-logs?page=1&pageSize=20 with Participant Authorization bearer token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 with Participant Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 for each unauthorized organizer-scoped paginated list; RBAC enforced before paginated envelope with total is returned; no partial total metadata leaked on denial

cases.title: GET /api/v1/me/registrations returns HTTP 200 with integer total field
preconditions: Participant with at least one registration across events
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/me/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 with Participant Authorization bearer
Verify HTTP status code and total field type in response body
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items (array), page=1, pageSize=20, total as non-negative integer, and totalPages per API design §3 example; total equals participant-scoped registration row count per FR-31

cases.title: Invalid pagination parameters return HTTP 400 INVALID_PAGINATION without total envelope
preconditions: Any paginated list endpoint accessible to authenticated actor
Valid JWT where endpoint requires auth
steps: GET with page=0&pageSize=20
GET with page=1&pageSize=101
cases.expected: Each invalid request returns HTTP 400 with error.code INVALID_PAGINATION per API design §3; no paginated envelope with total returned for invalid page or pageSize parameters

cases.title: Paginated list API returns totalPages as ceil(total divided by pageSize)
preconditions: Real Postgres test harness with transaction rollback per test
Paginated list endpoint with seedable matching row counts (e.g. GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations)
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: GET list endpoint with page=1 and pageSize=20 when matching row count is 0; record total and totalPages
Seed fixture with 25 matching rows; GET page=1 pageSize=20; record total and totalPages
Seed or use fixture with 40 matching rows; GET page=1 pageSize=20; record total and totalPages
cases.expected: totalPages=1 when total=0; totalPages=2 when total=25; totalPages=2 when total=40; total echoed unchanged in envelope per API design §3 totalPages formula and FR-31

cases.title: Waitlist list total equals full FIFO queue row count before paging
preconditions: Event at capacity with at least 25 active waitlist entries
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
Real Postgres test database
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/waitlist?page=1&pageSize=20
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/waitlist?page=2&pageSize=20
Count active waitlist entries for the event in persistence layer
cases.expected: Page 1 items.length=20 with total matching full waitlist row count; page 2 carries same total metadata; total equals active waitlist entry count before paging per FR-30a dedicated waitlist view and FR-31 total on organizer waitlist list

cases.title: My registrations total reflects optional state filter applied server-side
preconditions: Participant with registrations in Registered, Waitlisted, and Cancelled states
Authenticated Participant JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/me/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 and record unfiltered total
GET /api/v1/me/registrations?state=Waitlisted&page=1&pageSize=20
Count Waitlisted registration rows for the participant in persistence layer
cases.expected: Waitlisted filter total equals participant Waitlisted row count only; unfiltered total equals all participant registration rows; totalPages computed from filtered total per AC-18c server-side state filter and FR-31 total metadata
